catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM catJAM

I woke up at like 8 PM

I've had 10 hour terraria sessions before

now, a 24 hour hard fangame stream would be like double insane

tbf a game like minecraft is easier to spend lots of time in than hard fangames
like hard games like that i can barely play for a couple hours

That was like two weeks ago
i have streamed exactly once for like 30 minutes

except my internet died halfway through so idk
That was also like one of the only times I've ever done webcam streams, when I was like 12

Normal's pop-off is pretty legendary too lmao
has blue? id imagine he cleared his own shit lol
I'm fairly certain Blue has cleared everything he's made
I've heard apparently Blue cleared Mayumushi in 3 hours
I mean, in fairness that's a bit of a different metric considering he made it
but even so, like, bro what the fuck lol
Maker bias is a fucking powerful thing
You never truly think about how much easier it is for you to clear something you made as opposed to another person playing it, no matter how good they are
one stream! one stream! one stream!
is this actual heartrate or razzor heartrate

tfw you're gonna clear this in less than an hour

20 final attempts in one day lets fucking goooooo
I'm just hoping that clearing this wouldn't end up using up all of your RNG points and leaving you with none for the Avoidance Tournament
i thought you restocked on rng points everyday
I wonder, if you were able to consistently clear maze piano, how many red piano attempts could you expect in one day
Tbh I feel like if you were able to get to red piano consistently you could very easily just luck it out
You know right like, this version of Entrance goes so fucking hard
It's interesting to me that Entrance has existed for such a long time, and yet even now it still continues to be a hard fucking banger
I've actually never known, which came first: Touch the Entrance or Bye the Entrance?
why are there so many entrance avoidances tho
Cause Entrance is a fucking banger
Except these bosses are all very bullshit
but they're still kind of epic tho
I imagine Touch the Entrance used to be a really big deal back in the days, when barely any other equally as hard avoidances existed
Tbh I think the fact that they fit the song as well as they do is great
Even if it does mean they're super bullshit to account for that
Tbh I think the song of a boss alone can really make all the difference
Like, there's plenty of bosses that have awesome songs
I will still call it one stream clear
but it takes a special kind of song to make a boss that's like this still feel epic
I think that's one thing that makes Last TIS as special as it is tbh
The lineup of songs are all HARD fucking slappers
and phase 5's song fits so perfectly, especially if you know the context of what that song is originally used for
I never knew the context until recently, but like, knowing it makes phase 5 so much crazier
at least phase 5 in last TIS isn't literally so dense that it requires you to abuse screen scrolling, like in the origin of the song
Cause like, there was clearly a thought process put into it to mimic Mushihemasama in some way
I had that recently with MHC tbh lmao
Like I was super calm up until I got to RNG, and then as soon as I got to Rubik's Cube in one attempt I went from like 90 to 150 in a fucking second
MHC is most definitely like that I have to say
Even in practice, RNG Hell feels that way
Like, you don't get nervous for most of RNG Hell
and then the moment you get to 2nd to last, it's like "Oh FUCK"
That's what happened the first time I cleared the RNG
I was completely calm for almost all of it
and then as soon as I realized I was gonna get to final I probably got up to like 170 from that alone
lmao nick i read that in your typical YEEEEES voice
That's what I was hoping for
Any time you see me type that just know that's 100% the intent I'm going for
I haven't played much of Extremity since I got to gray
Gray just looks completely unreasonable for me tbh
Like, there's a couple of Gray warps I know I can do
but there's 3 in particular I think may be unreasonable for me to do period
even though my grades are shit as fuck
EX is definitely unreasonable for me though
the last kne was a 98 cause it was the easy class
There's 1 particular warp in EX that is so fucking obscenely ridiculous that I can't even put it into words
but there's an exploit to get into EX
I actually did it on accident lmao
but I ended up there and was like fuck it, might as well check it out
and uh, yeah EX is kind of inhuman ngkl
1 of them is like, probably not that bad, but it's bruh
1 of them is a 4.5 where you have to do like a million stutters
seems like we finally got the mayumushi of needle
and then 1 of them is this thing where you have to do a double cactus downwards through a double plane with a vine in it with a very specific valign setup
The double plane one is the one that's just not going to happen for me
I may try to clear the game tho at least since you don't have to do all of Gray to clear
but you have to do 6, which means I'll have to do a couple of fucked up warps
I'd also have to do 3 more in blue
and my options in Blue are very limited since 2 of them are very absurd
Needle extremity is definitely an interesting game to say the least
he will never beat michaelmushi in 4 hours

After having seen the hardest warps in Gray and EX, like, it probably isn't necessarily the hardest possible trials game, but at least compared to any that are released right now, it's pretty fucking crazy
